active_risks.description: Future broad cleanup commands could delete or revert user work in a dirty worktree.
active_risks.impact: Loss of source changes, evidence files, or generated assets that the user expects to keep.
active_risks.mitigation: Generated artifact paths are ignored. Continue using path-scoped cleanup only after confirming ownership.

active_risks.description: Further UI/UX changes can improve one breakpoint while regressing another without runtime checks.
active_risks.impact: Dashboard routes may pass unit tests while still creating overflow, clipped controls, or poor interaction states.
active_risks.mitigation: Keep responsive CSS contracts and pair meaningful UI work with desktop/mobile Playwright checks.
